summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Finance Dashboard with RBAC. Found critical issues with category filtering and RBAC functionality that were supposed to be fixed. Despite main agent's claim that category filter was fixed, both category filtering and RBAC are completely broken.

ui_bugs.issue: Category filter completely broken - selecting 'Food' shows all 60 transactions instead of filtering to only 28 Food transactions
ui_bugs.details: Filter dropdown works but filtering logic is broken. Shows 60 rows with 28 Food badges and 58 other category badges when Food is selected.

ui_bugs.issue: Role-based access control completely broken - User role shows all 60 transactions instead of only Sarah Chen's transactions
ui_bugs.details: Role switcher UI works but transaction filtering by userId is not working. User role should show only Sarah Chen's (user-001) transactions.

ui_bugs.issue: CSV and JSON export buttons don't trigger actual downloads
ui_bugs.details: Export buttons are clickable and dropdown works, but no download files are generated.

integration_issues.issue: Zustand store getFilteredTransactions function not properly filtering by category
Zustand store getFilteredTransactions function not properly filtering by user role/userId

passed_tests: Dark mode toggle - Works correctly and persists in localStorage
Search filter - 'Grocery' search returned 5 results correctly
Date range filtering - 'This Month' filter returned 10 results
Empty state handling - Shows correctly with 'xyznonexistent' search and clear filters button works
Responsive design - Works on mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px)
Role switcher UI - Dropdown works and shows correct user profiles
Charts functionality - Monthly trends bar chart and category breakdown pie chart display correctly
Insights cards - All 3 cards present and display data
Framer Motion animations - 67 animated elements detected
Sorting buttons - Date, category, and amount sort buttons are clickable
No watermark visible - 'Made with Emergent' badge is not present on page
Page loading - Application loads successfully on all screen sizes
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix category filtering and RBAC functionality in Zustand store. Category filter shows all transactions instead of filtering by selected category. RBAC shows all 60 transactions for both admin and user roles instead of filtering user role to only Sarah Chen's transactions. Export functionality also needs fixing to trigger actual downloads.
